name: The Score Hamiltonian: Mapping Diffusion Models to Adiabatic Transport
summary: arXiv:2606.05217v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We exhibit an exact correspondence between sampling with score-based diffusion models and adiabatic transport of ground states for a family...
description: arXiv:2606.05217v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We exhibit an exact correspondence between sampling with score-based diffusion models and adiabatic transport of ground states for a family of Schr\"odinger operators we call Score Hamiltonians, built from the learned score's quantum potential. We obtain novel density reconstruction bounds and principled annealing schedules via adiabatic...
author: Peter Halmos, Boris Hanin
